scripts.start: bun run tailwind:build && bun run src/bun/index.ts
scripts.dev: bun run tailwind:build && (bun run tailwind:watch & bun src/bun/index.ts)
scripts.validate: bunx biome check src/bun src/mainview/index.ts src/mainview/input.css
scripts.build:dev: bun install && bun run tailwind:build && bun build src/mainview/index.ts --outdir ./.jt-ide-build --target browser
